name: github
description: GitHub CLI operations — issue management, project board automation, and GraphQL API access for the opensassi/a0 repository

tools.name: auth_check
tools.description: Verify that gh CLI is authenticated. Fails with a clear error if not logged in.

tools.name: issue_list
tools.description: List GitHub issues with filters. Supports filtering by state, label, and custom JSON output fields.

json.description: Comma-separated JSON fields to return (e.g. number,title,milestone,labels)

tools.name: issue_view
tools.description: View a single GitHub issue. Can return full details or specific JSON fields with jq filtering.

jq.description: jq filter expression to apply to the JSON output

tools.name: issue_create
tools.description: Create a new GitHub issue with title, labels, and body.

tools.name: issue_edit
tools.description: Edit an existing GitHub issue — milestone, body, body-file, add-label, remove-label.

bodyFile.description: Path to file containing body text

tools.name: graphql
tools.description: Execute a GitHub GraphQL API query or mutation via gh api graphql. Pass query via the 'field' parameter as 'query=...' key=value string.

field.description: GraphQL field in key=value format (e.g. query=query { viewer { login } })

jq.description: jq filter to apply to the response

rawField.description: Additional raw fields sent as-is (for mutation inputs)

tools.name: project_field_list
tools.description: List custom fields and their selectable options for a GitHub Project V2.

prompts.name: verify_setup
prompts.description: Verify gh CLI authentication and discover the open GitHub Project V2 linked to this repository

prompts.name: lookup_phase_fields
prompts.description: Look up current Phase option IDs for the project board

prompts.name: create_board_issue
prompts.description: Create a new issue and fully set up its project board fields (milestone, phase, status, size)

prompts.name: link_sub_issue
prompts.description: Link a sub-issue to a parent epic by appending a tasklist entry to the epic's body
